specs.title: initial rendering: root, five branches, collapsed children, default detail
initial D3 render completes within 500ms
branch expand/collapse via node click and toolbar buttons
search filters and highlights a match, hiding no-results
search shows the no-results state for an unknown term
clearing the search restores the tree and removes highlights
search reveals matches across sibling branches
selecting a node updates detail title, text, and source
responsive usability: toolbar controls reachable in viewport
zoom layer exists and reset view keeps the tree visible
hover tooltip shows node title and summary
keyboard shortcuts focus search, clear it, and zoom
node drag records a custom offset and keeps links rendered
export menu and reset state remain reachable in the viewport
SVG export downloads an offline map containing the root title
PNG export downloads a non-empty image
Markdown export includes nested titles even while branches are collapsed
JSON export includes complete map data and the view snapshot
collapse, drag, zoom, and selection state survive reload
reset state clears persisted view state
reset view preserves custom node drag offsets
layout switcher is visible and defaults to horizontal
radial layout keeps the root and five branches visible
radial layout survives a reset view
switching back to horizontal restores toggle interactions
layout switch completes under 500ms
expand-all under radial stays interactive
edit mode reveals selected-node fields and saves changes
edited values survive tree rerenders in the current session
editing can add and delete a non-root child with confirmation
root cannot be deleted
reload restores edits when the Workstream A state store is integrated
map exposes ARIA tree semantics and roving tabindex
arrow, Home, and End keys move tree focus
left and right arrows expand and collapse branches while preserving focus
global shortcuts do not fire while typing in edit fields
